violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. -Employees doing glove changes without handwash between.

Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Different species of raw animal food was not properly separated from each other or arranged according to minimum cooking temperatures. -Ground beef above above whole muscle beef in walk in cooler.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. -Dispenser on cook line was empty.
Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution between uses. -1 wet cloth sitting on prep table.

Thawing potentially hazardous food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not thawed in an approved manner. -Bag of sausages sitting out to thaw, Was moved to walk in cooler. Needs thawed under cold running water or under refrigeration.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Food storage pans on clean dish rack need further cleaning.
Toilet facilities. — --Odor of sewer gas evident.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floor drain and floors need cleaned under dishwasher.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Proper storage, labeling, use (3 pts deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
